title: AFIX Compliance Event — Regulatory Extension
description: Additional fields for EU AI Act Article 12, MiFID II RTS 25, and SEC 17a-4 compliance

model_id.description: Model identifier used for the governed action (EU AI Act Article 12 requirement)

model_version.description: Model version string for reproducibility audits

dataset_version.description: Training/reference dataset version (EU AI Act Article 12 requirement)

timestamp_microsecond.description: Microsecond-precision timestamp for MiFID II RTS 25 compliance (replaces millisecond base timestamp for regulated trading contexts)

log_integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the complete compliance event payload at emission time. Supports EU AI Act tamper-evidence requirements and SEC 17a-4 immutability requirements.

minimum_retention_years.description: Minimum retention period (SEC 17a-4: 6 years, MiFID II: 5 years)

regulatory_report_refs.description: URIs to regulatory reports this event feeds (OATS, CAT, TRACE, transaction reporting)

human_oversight_record.description: EU AI Act Article 14 human oversight documentation

classification_rationale.description: Machine-readable rationale for the action's risk classification. Required for EU AI Act high-risk system transparency obligations.
